reviews.comment:
Este año solo estuve de pasada, las habitaciones son muy buenas, hay que reservar con mucho tiempo, por supuesto no había lugar
Por suerte conseguí una cabaña al otro lado del río, muuuy confortable, y a menor precio.
El empleado del shop bastante antipático, lo habré encontrado en un mal día

(Translated by Google)
I only passed through this year. The rooms are very nice, but you have to book well in advance, and of course, there was no availability. Luckily, I managed to find a cabin on the other side of the river, very comfortable, and at a lower price. The shop employee was quite unfriendly; I must have encountered him on a bad day.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyelB5Ql9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Compramos hamburguesas y papas fritas que estaban súper recalentadas y viejas, las papas estaban duras de lo viejas que eran.

(Translated by Google)
We bought hamburgers and fries that were super reheated and old; the fries were hard from how old they were.
